message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor Customer
participant Device
participant DeviceProvisioningService #cyan
participant ProductIoTHub #cyan
participant FWProvider #yellow

note over Device, FWProvider: Device was registered for this product before

== First start ==

Customer -> Device: 1 Switch On/Power Up

note over Device, ProductIoTHub: Booting up

Device -> DeviceProvisioningService: 2 registerDevice(callback)
DeviceProvisioningService --> Device: 3 callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ASSIGNED, IoTHubURI, deviceId)
Device -> Device: 4 setProperties
Device -> ProductIoTHub: 5 iamNewToYou(deviceId, firmwareversion)

opt Firmware needs to be updated
    ProductIoTHub -> Device: 6 updateFWMandantory(URL)
    Device -> FWProvider: 7 URL.get(OLDFW)
    FWProvider --> Device: 8 FW, Checksum

    note over Device, FWProvider: Downloading

    Device -> Device: 9 CheckChecksum
    Device -> Device: 10 update

    note over Device, FWProvider: Installing

    Device -> Device: 11 restart

    note over Device, FWProvider: Booting up

    Device -> ProductIoTHub: 12 iamNewToYou(deviceId, firmwareversion)
end

ProductIoTHub -> Device: 13 youMayStartSending()
Device -> ProductIoTHub: 14 sendData(Data)

note over Device, FWProvider: Working

== Claim/Remove ==

ProductIoTHub -> Device: 15 youMustRetire()
Device -> Device: 16 waits

opt if Device was not reached
    Device -> ProductIoTHub: 17 sendData(Data)
    ProductIoTHub --> Device: 18 Not registered
    Device -> DeviceProvisioningService: 19 registerDevice(callback)
    DeviceProvisioningService --> Device: 20 callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ERROR, null, null)
    Device -> Device: 21 NobodyLovesMeMode()

    loop once a day
        Device -> DeviceProvisioningService: 22 registerDevice(callback)
    end
end

== IoT Hub not available ==

loop several times
    Device -> ProductIoTHub: 23 sendData(Data)
    ProductIoTHub --> Device: 24 NotAvailable/Network Error
    Device -> DeviceProvisioningService: 25 registerDevice(callback)
    DeviceProvisioningService --> Device: 26 callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ASSIGNED, IoTHubURI, deviceId)
    Device -> Device: 27 compare IoTHub and change if necessary
end

note over Device, FWProvider: if connection is now successfull, go on. If not and IoT Hub has not changed\nrepeat with low frequence. Also if DPS is not available.

@enduml
```
